title: [HWArithToHW] Make operation conversion fully generic
body:
I'm saying bye-bye to my fancy templates in favor of a fully generic solution. All operations (including function/module-style ops) are now marked as dynamically legal, and may be replaced generically by the new `TypeConversionPattern`. This pattern copies all parts of the operation (attributes, regions, ...) and type converts them, before re-creating the operation.

Not only is this less code, it will work on _any_ operation which uses types with signedness semantics, thus alleviating #4889 as well as (ideally) any future issue around improper operation support for this pass.

This solution was inspired by: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/blob/main/mlir/lib/Conversion/MemRefToSPIRV/MapMemRefStorageClassPass.cpp

Sidenote - i really like this style of generic rewriting and it's been something I've been looking for for a while... so this is probably not the last time that I'll be using this style!
